popularStory.headline: Raymond de Bourgogne (1170-1107)
popularStory.description:
Raymond de Bourgogne, né vers 1070 à Besançon et mort le 24 mai 1107 à Grajal de Campos, est comte de Galice en Espagne.

Biographie

Fils du comte Guillaume Ier de Bourgogne et d'Étiennette, Raymond …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Raymond De Bourgogne Count of Galicia於1070年11月11日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c時，他的父親Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne51歲，母親Étiennette de Longwy-Metz36歲。他於1095年與Reina Urraca de León在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1107年3月24日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安利安享年36歲，埋葬在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納桑亞格 德 可波斯特拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raymond De Bourgogne Count of Galicia于1070年11月11日出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c时，他的父亲Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne51岁，母亲Étiennette de Longwy-Metz36岁。他于1095年与Reina Urraca de León在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1107年3月24日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安利安享年36岁，埋葬在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納桑亞格 德 可波斯特拉。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Raymond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Raimund, of Germanic origin, from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + mund ‘protector’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. Subsequently it dropped out of use, but was revived in the middle of the 19th century, together with several other given names of Old English and Norman origin.

en.lifeSummary: When Raymond De Bourgogne Count of Galicia was born on 11 November 1070, in Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, was 51 and his mother, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, was 36. He married Reina Urraca de León in 1095, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 24 March 1107, in León, León, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 36, and was buried in Santiago de Compostela, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raymond De Bourgogne Count of Galicia est né le 11 novembre 1070, à Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Reina Urraca de León en 1095, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1107, à León, León, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Santiago de Compostela, A Coruña, Galicia, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raymond De Bourgogne Count of Galicia am 11. November 1070 in Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne 51 und seine Mutter Étiennette de Longwy-Metz 36. Er hat 1095 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Reina Urraca de León geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. März 1107 im Alter von 36 Jahren in León, León, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Santiago de Compostela, A Coruña, Galicia, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond De Bourgogne Count of Galicia è nato il il 11 novembre 1070 nel Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Reina Urraca de León nel 1095, nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 marzo 1107, nel León, León, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Santiago de Compostela, A Coruña, Galicia, Spagna.

ko.lifeSummary: Raymond De Bourgogne Count of Galicia(이)가 1070년 11월 11일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 다브스 베산c에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Étiennette de Longwy-Metz(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1095년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Reina Urraca de León(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1107년 3월 24일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 레o 레o에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 갈리샤 에이 코루n아 산티아고 데 콤포스텔아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond De Bourgogne Count of Galicia nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1070, em Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Reina Urraca de León em 1095, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1107, em León, León, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Santiago de Compostela, A Coruña, Galicia, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raymond De Bourgogne Count of Galicia родился 11 ноября 1070 г. в местности бесанcон, доубс, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Reina Urraca de León в 1095 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 марта 1107 г. в местности леoн, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности сантяго де компостела, а коруnа, галися, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raymond De Bourgogne Count of Galicia nació el 11 de noviembre de 1070, en Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Reina Urraca de León en 1095, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1107, en León, León, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Santiago de Compostela, La Coruña, Galicia, España.
